title: Surat Thani、Surat Thani — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Surat Thani、Surat Thani的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Surat Thani是Surat Thani的一个城市，人口约130,000。The gateway to the Gulf of Thailand islands, this provincial capital offers a very low cost of living and easy access to Koh Samui, Koh Phangan, and Koh Tao.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
